name: Amesite Inc.
summary: Overview Amesite is a technology company focused on building and commercializing AI-powered solutions for the healthcare sector, with particular emphasis on the post-acute care market. In fiscal 2025, we completed our pivot from an education-centric model to one firmly anchored in the demands and opportunities of healthcarea shift driven by the scale, complexity, and attractive growth potential of this sector.
